value.found_quote:
Set up tracing
Learn how to enable Cloud Trace on your agent and view traces to analyze query response times and executed operations.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes a "Set up tracing" guide that matches the claim almost verbatim: it enables Cloud Trace on agents to view traces and analyze query response times and executed operations. The page is also marked as "Preview" under the Pre-GA Offerings Terms, indicating it is not yet generally available.
